response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong web, mobile, and some embedded background, but the role specifically requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership. Core stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not C++, and there is no evidence of technical leadership over cloud/DevOps engineers at the scale required.
strengths: Long tenure across reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog-listed) with senior/staff titles
Strong testing culture, TDD, CI/CD, and mentoring/workshop experience
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience — only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments
No demonstrated experience leading or architecting a large-scale internal cloud compute platform
No evidence of formal technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform/distributed infra leadership
Senior/Staff engineering tenure and mentoring track record
